title: GRX visual diff evidence document
description: GRX-007 scaffold: reference/candidate frame capture plan and LDR per-channel absolute diff evidence for the seven fixed benchmark scenes. This is scaffold-stage format only. A capture frame with status=skip MUST record a skip_reason and MUST NOT carry fabricated diff numbers or frame paths: reference_frame_path, candidate_frame_path, ldr_diff, hdr_diff, and temporal_diff must be null or absent when status=skip. HDR and temporal diff fields are declared but not produced at this stage. Visual verification is only considered done when real reference AND candidate frame files exist and an ldr_diff (or hdr/temporal diff) is actually computed.

run_mode.description: scaffold = build-stage placeholder plan; full = real capture run. Scaffold documents are not eligible as close-out visual evidence.

evidence_level.description: measured_local once real frames are captured; scaffold placeholder plans use scaffold.

scenes.description: Exactly seven scenes; fixed name/order is enforced by visual_diff.py reader. Each scene defines at least one capture frame.

status.description: pass requires real reference+candidate frame files and a computed ldr_diff; skip requires a non-empty skip_reason.

skip_reason.description: Required when status=skip. Must name the concrete missing input: missing capture backend / missing Godot full run / missing frame artifact.

ldr_diff.description: LDR per-channel absolute diff. Only present for status=pass with real frames. per_channel_max_abs / per_channel_mean_abs are [r, g, b] non-negative arrays and are both required when ldr_diff is an object.

hdr_diff.description: Declared but not produced at GRX-007 scaffold stage. ssim/psnr remain null until a real HDR pipeline exists.

temporal_diff.description: Declared but not produced at GRX-007 scaffold stage. temporal_stability remains null until a real temporal capture window exists.
